## What & why

<!-- Explain the change and the motivation. Link relevant issues. -->

## Checklist

- [ ] Updated relevant docs under `docs/` (and `README.md` if the public API changed)
- [ ] Added a `CHANGELOG.md` entry under `[Unreleased]` (root and/or `packages/*/CHANGELOG.md` if a wrapper changed)
- [ ] Added/updated tests for the behavior change
- [ ] `npm run verify` passes locally (lint, format check, typecheck, coverage-enforced tests, build)
- [ ] Screenshots/recordings attached for UI changes
